children.text:
Search

Select a dictionary and type a word in the Search field.

Dictionaries

Additional dictionaries can be downloaded by clicking on the Add (+) button.
Downloaded dictionaries will stay on the device and can be viewed offline.
Dictionaries can be removed by clicking Add (+) and on the dictionary in the displayed list.

It is possible to evaluate and give a note to a dictionary. Click Add, then long click on the dictionary and click on Note.

Bookmarks / History

Slide the left border (or click the upper left icon) to open history and bookmarks.

Advanced search / Crossword search

Wildcard characters can be used to perform advanced searches.

 • Use ? to replace a single letter. For example, searching ?at will give: bat, cat, fat, hat…
 • Use * to replace from 0 to N letters. For example, searching m*e will give: machine, made, magazine, me, message…
 • Wildcards can be combined:
   • m?t*e will give: mate, mute, materialize…
   • use *cat* to find words containing cat
 • Wildcards can be used many times. e?ecu???? will give: executing, executive…

It can be useful to solve crossword puzzles.

Text to speech

A text to speech feature can be activated by pressing Menu and then Text to speech. It is able to read the current definition. If only a part of the text is selected, only this part will be read. 
It is also possible to read from current cursor position. Cursor position can be changed by clicking where you want on the text. 
The more appropriate language will be selected automatically. 

Text to speech availability and installed languages depend on your device.
For the price of a coffee !
